theme.style: Deep Australian vineyard country aesthetic: rich forest-green backgrounds with warm burgundy and harvest-gold accents evoking red Australian soil and late-afternoon light over canopy rows. Premium and earthy, with a confident professional mood — textured depth, warm directional lighting, and sophisticated dark tones that feel both rugged and refined. Each slide lives in the same dark-green and burgundy world with golden amber highlights, keeping the deck cohesive across all feature reveals.

slides.label: Summary Page
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art featuring sweeping arcs of deep forest green (#1A3328) and warm harvest gold (#C9943A) ribbons curving diagonally from the lower-left corner upward, blending into rich dark green in the upper third, with a soft volumetric amber glow diffusing at the center-right. Subtle layered translucent planes catch the warm light, adding depth and a premium textured feel with fine grain across the entire composition. Upper 30% is calm near-black forest green for text readability. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Repairs
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract 3D rendered scene with angular fractured geometric shards in deep burgundy (#6E2639) and dark forest green, lit dramatically from the upper-left with a sharp beam of warm amber light casting long hard shadows across the faceted surfaces. The upper region fades to near-black, while shards in the lower half catch rich crimson and gold rim lighting creating vivid contrast and cinematic depth. Fine metallic dust particles drift across the frame adding atmosphere. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Growth
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital painting of organic liquid forms rising from the bottom of the frame in deep forest green (#1A3328) and emerald, curling upward into soft flowing tendrils that dissolve into warm harvest gold (#C9943A) and amber at mid-frame. A diffused warm glow emanates softly from the center-right, and the upper 30% settles into a calm dark teal-black. Subtle depth-of-field blur on edges adds painterly texture and dimensional warmth. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Pins
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art depicting a vast dark forest-green (#1A3328) expanse scattered with a constellation of tiny warm golden (#C9943A) luminous points connected by ultra-thin amber threads, forming an irregular geometric web across the frame. A soft diffused amber glow pools gently in the lower-center, while the upper third remains dark and serene with only faint distant dots visible. Fine atmospheric haze adds depth between the luminous threads and the dark background. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Yield Estimate
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract 3D rendered scene with a large softly glowing amber sphere bleeding warm harvest gold (#C9943A) and deep burgundy (#6E2639) light from the lower-right, sending long horizontal gradient bands across a dark forest-green (#1A3328) base. Sweeping molten gold arcs trail from the sphere across the mid-frame, and wisps of translucent burgundy smoke drift lazily upward toward a calm near-black upper region. Subtle volumetric light rays fan outward from the sphere's edge. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Spray Program
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art with multiple layered frosted glass planes stacked at steep angles in deep forest green (#1A3328) and dark burgundy (#6E2639), each thin edge catching a bright line of warm amber (#C9943A) rim light against dramatic deep shadows between the layers. Fine luminous particles drift through the gaps between planes catching the warm light, and the upper 30% fades cleanly to dark near-black green for contrast. Subtle grain texture across all surfaces adds a premium tactile quality. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups
